ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of clothing item (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is intended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item being measured */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the clothing item */,
  "ankle" REAL /* Ankle measurement */,
  "elbow" REAL /* Elbow measurement */,
  "tennis_elbow" REAL /* Tennis elbow measurement */,
  "knee" REAL /* Knee measurement */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement */,
  "wrist" REAL /* Wrist measurement */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement */,
  "outseam" REAL /* Outseam measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the clothing item */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order in which the item was sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
